corrections.text: Two of the four cited sources (ir.unither.com and stocktitan.net) were not present in the project's source allowlist at submission time. Both are reputable — ir.unither.com is United Therapeutics' official investor-relations domain hosting the BUSINESS WIRE primary press release, and stocktitan.net is a financial wire that mirrors the same release. Both were manually verified by the Chief Editor against the snapshot content. No factual changes to the article are required; this record is filed for editorial transparency.
